user.title: Connect to Proxmox VE
user.description: Enter the SSH connection details for your Proxmox VE host. The username must be a PAM user with sufficient permissions to run the desired scripts.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to host. Check the IP address and port.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant log for details.

add_script.title: Add Script
add_script.description: The script name is used as the button label in Home Assistant. The script content is executed as bash on the Proxmox VE node.

remove_script.title: Remove Script
remove_script.description: Select the script you want to remove. The corresponding button entity will be removed on save.
